title: ProjectConfig
description: Shape of `.skill-map.json` at the project root. All fields optional; defaults apply when absent. camelCase keys throughout — consistent with the rest of the spec.

schemaVersion.description: Config file shape version. Bumped on breaking changes to this schema.

adapters.description: Adapter ids to enable, in priority order when multiple match. Empty/absent = use all registered.

roots.description: Directories (relative to the config file) to scan. Defaults to the scope root.

ignore.description: Glob patterns to exclude, in addition to `.skill-mapignore`.

tokenize.description: Whether to compute token counts. Default true.

strict.description: Promote frontmatter warnings to errors. Default false.

plugins.description: Per-plugin enable/disable overrides. Keys are plugin ids. Absent = use installed default (enabled).

config.description: Plugin-specific config passed to extensions at load time. Shape defined by the plugin.

share.description: When true, `./.skill-map/history.json` is intended to be committed. Stability: experimental. Default false.

retentionDays.description: How long to keep execution records before GC.

graceMultiplier.description: Default grace multiplier applied to `expectedDurationSeconds`. Default 3.

perActionTtl.description: Per-action TTL overrides (seconds). Keys are action ids.
